reponses.text: Very low : You need to start taking deliberate steps to develop your cultural intelligence.
Low : You've started considering how to 'be' in a global world, but you should consider paying more conscious attention to developing your cultural intelligence.
Average : You're making progress, but more attention is needed for success in the global marketplace.
Above average : You're well on your way to having the cultural intelligence needed to become an effective global leader.
Cultural genius : Your colleagues would probably benefit greatly from your approach. Be sure to share what you do and know with them!

categories.description: Use this self-assessment to get an idea of your level of cultural intelligence.
categories.title: How often do the following statements apply to you?

questions.text: I put effort into finding out the differences and similarities between cultures around the world and my own culture.
I feel comfortable talking with people from different cultures.
I am aware that cultural differences may cause different understandings of the same goals.
I am mindful of the influence of culture on me and on those from other cultures.
I adapt my behavior according to the cultural situation.
I leverage the underlying motives of the people I lead to achieve team goals.
I factor in the perspectives of people from other cultures when interacting with them.
If I can't fully accomodate everyone's cultural motivations, I try to adapt in smaller ways.
I build trust through reasoning or in a social manner, depending on the culture I am interacting with.
I feel that I interact effectively with people who are culturally different from me.
I put effort into finding out the differences and similarities between cultures around the world and my own culture.
